text: The bone mass in my spine improved. One hip was stable and one had lower bone density none I took the fosamax with 8 oz. of water and walked around for an hour.The first couple of years I did not take calcium supplements. Then I did. Since I do not think the results were really an improvemrnt, Now I am taking a calcium supplement with vitamin D and magnesium and a fairly new drug called foseum which is suppose to be entirely natural like an herb, but more expensive than fosamax that must be taken twice a day.
